meaning: [生]n.粗线期(指细胞减数分裂前期的第三期,其间配对的染色体变粗并分裂成染色单体)
examples: Each chromosome in pachytene actually have been composed of two chromatids.
The synaptonemal complexes stretch gradually from the early pachytene to late pachytene.
Prophase may be divided into successive stages termed leptotene, zygotene, pachytene, diplotene, and diakinesis.
